worktree_state.content:
<%# Order Status View - Order Tracking Page Displays order status, details, and real-time updates. Shown after successful order placement or accessed via order link. Variables: - order: Order object {id, orderNumber, status, items[], total, customerName, createdAt, estimatedReadyAt} - menu: Current menu object (optional) - organization: Organization object - tableNumber: Optional table number - lang: Current language code (tr/en) %> <% // Status configuration const statusConfig = { pending: { icon: 'clock', color: 'yellow', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.pending') : 'Order Received', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.pendingDesc') : 'Your order has been received and is waiting for confirmation' }, confirmed: { icon: 'check-circle', color: 'blue', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.confirmed') : 'Confirmed', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.confirmedDesc') : 'Your order has been confirmed and will be prepared soon' }, preparing: { icon: 'cooking-pot', color: 'purple', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.preparing') : 'Preparing', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.preparingDesc') : 'Our kitchen is preparing your order' }, ready: { icon: 'bell-ringing', color: 'green', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.ready') : 'Ready', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.readyDesc') : 'Your order is ready for pickup or will be served shortly' }, delivered: { icon: 'check', color: 'gray', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.delivered') : 'Delivered', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.deliveredDesc') : 'Your order has been delivered. Enjoy!' }, cancelled: { icon: 'x-circle', color: 'red', label: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.cancelled') : 'Cancelled', description: typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.status.cancelledDesc') : 'This order has been cancelled' } }; const currentStatus = locals.order ? statusConfig[order.status] || statusConfig.pending : statusConfig.pending; const statusSteps = ['pending', 'confirmed', 'preparing', 'ready', 'delivered']; const currentStepIndex = statusSteps.indexOf(locals.order ? order.status : 'pending'); %>
<% if (!locals.order) { %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.notFound') : 'Order Not Found' %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.notFoundDesc') : 'We could not find an order with this ID. Please check the link and try again.' %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.backToMenu') : 'Back to Menu' %>
<% } else { %>

<%= currentStatus.label %>

<%= currentStatus.description %>

#<%= order.orderNumber %>
<% if (order.status !== 'cancelled') { %>
<% statusSteps.forEach(function(step, index) { const stepConfig = statusConfig[step]; const isCompleted = index <= currentStepIndex; const isCurrent = index === currentStepIndex; %>
<% if (isCompleted && !isCurrent) { %> <% } else { %> <% } %>
<%= stepConfig.label.split(' ')[0] %>
<% if (index < statusSteps.length - 1) { %>
<% } %> <% }); %>
<% } %> <% if (order.estimatedReadyAt && order.status !== 'cancelled' && order.status !== 'delivered') { %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.estimatedTime') : 'Estimated Ready Time' %>

<%= new Date(order.estimatedReadyAt).toLocaleTimeString(locals.lang === 'en' ? 'en-US' : 'tr-TR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' }) %>

<% } %>

<%= order.customerName %>

<% if (order.customerPhone) { %>

<%= order.customerPhone %>

<% } %>
<% if (locals.tableNumber || order.tableNumber) { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.table') : 'Table' %> <%= locals.tableNumber || order.tableNumber %> <% } %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.items') : 'Order Items' %>

    <% if (order.items && order.items.length > 0) { %> <% order.items.forEach(function(item) { %>
  • <%= item.quantity %>x <%= item.name %>
    <% if (item.variants && item.variants.length > 0) { %>

    <%= item.variants.map(v => v.name).join(', ') %>

    <% } %> <% if (item.modifiers && item.modifiers.length > 0) { %>

    + <%= item.modifiers.map(m => m.name).join(', ') %>

    <% } %>
    <%= (item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString('tr-TR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'TRY' }) %>
    • <% }); %> <% } %>
<% if (order.customerNote) { %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.notes') : 'Note:' %> <%= order.customerNote %>

<% } %>
<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.total') : 'Total' %> <%= order.total.toLocaleString('tr-TR', { style: 'currency', currency: 'TRY' }) %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.orderType') : 'Order Type' %>

<% if (order.orderType === 'dine_in') { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.dineIn') : 'Dine In' %> <% } else { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.takeaway') : 'Takeaway' %> <% } %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.placedAt') : 'Placed At' %>

<%= new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleString(locals.lang === 'en' ? 'en-US' : 'tr-TR', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', day: 'numeric', month: 'short' }) %>

<% if (order.status === 'delivered' || order.status === 'cancelled') { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.newOrder') : 'Place New Order' %> <% } else { %> <% } %> <% if (locals.organization && organization.phone) { %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.contactRestaurant') : 'Contact Restaurant' %> <% } %> <%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('common.backToMenu') : 'Back to Menu' %>
<% if (order.status !== 'delivered' && order.status !== 'cancelled') { %>

<%= typeof t === 'function' ? t('order.autoRefreshNote') : 'This page will automatically update when your order status changes' %>

<% } %> <% } %>
